summary: Assess whether SMERC is ready for an outside technical team to run a bounded shadow-mode pilot.

gates.label: Working deterministic engine
gates.notes: Engine and action language are implemented and covered by unit tests.

gates.label: Authenticated pilot API
gates.notes: API supports scoped principals, tenant decisions, replay, reviews, permits, route API, and audit/security events.

gates.label: Posture-aware route layer
gates.notes: SPARTa converts stored SMERC decisions into executable, constrained, paused, blocked, or review-required routes.

gates.label: First shadow-mode integration path
gates.notes: GitHub Actions shadow-mode path exists for AI-assisted code, deployment, and infrastructure workflows.

gates.label: Pilot review and metrics loop
gates.notes: Pilot reviewers can record agreement, overrides, false release, false constraint, useful constraint, and latency.

gates.label: Documented local and hosted deployment path
gates.notes: Local, Docker, and Render deployment paths are documented for pilot review.

gates.label: Explicit limitations and stop conditions
gates.notes: Repository states that SMERC is not production-certified and names unresolved validation areas.

gates.label: External pilot data
gates.notes: No outside design-partner pilot data has been recorded yet. This is not required to start Level 5 shadow-mode outreach, but it is required to move toward Level 6.

gates.label: Independent production security review
gates.notes: No independent security assessment, compliance attestation, or production approval exists.

gates.label: Signed SPARTa route artifacts
gates.notes: SPARTa route reports exist, but route reports are not signed yet.
